ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (e.g., city, state) */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* File path to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Name of the team's mascot */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "conference_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the conference */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the conference was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference (e.g., region) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the conference */,
  "commissioner_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference commissioner */,
  "commissioner_email" TEXT /* Email address of the conference commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "coaching_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team for the season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team at the end of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "win_loss" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the team */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team in the season */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game by the team */,
  "championship_won" INTEGER /* Whether the team won the championship */,
  "postseason_appearance" INTEGER /* Whether the team made a postseason appearance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., stadium name, city) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, postseason, championship) */,
  "home_team_result" TEXT /* Result of the game for the home team (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "away_team_result" TEXT /* Result of the game for the away team (e.g., win, loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin, fan) */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the data is related to (if applicable) */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the data is related to (if applicable) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
